scenes.narration: Bhai, Google ke SDE-2 round mein IPC: Pipes, Sockets, Shared Memory pe ye trick poochhi jati hai. 30 second sun le.
Without understanding IPC: Pipes, Sockets, Shared Memory, systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of IPC: Pipes, Sockets, Shared Memory like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of IPC: Pipes, Sockets, Shared Memory: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of IPC: Pipes, Sockets, Shared Memory: fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use IPC: Pipes, Sockets, Shared Memory to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: IPC: Pipes, Sockets, Shared Memory solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
